expected_effect: Improve tasks that require scrolling to reveal remaining targets without changing the LLM prompt.

intervention.expected_effect: Improve tasks that require scrolling to reveal remaining targets without changing the LLM prompt.
intervention.rationale: Candidate failure evidence includes `missed_scroll_target`, so the agent likely submitted before scanning all hidden actionable targets.
intervention.risk: May add one extra step on matching tasks if the hidden-target heuristic is too broad.
intervention.summary: Enable a bounded scroll-before-submit action policy for hidden target failures.
